_comment: Domain DOI NO — nang luc: TRA CUU THONG TIN + TRA CUU TRI THUC + TU DUY TINH HUONG (cong xac thuc anti-IDOR, phan doan escalate vs plan vs record, compliance khong tiet lo cho ben thu 3).

tools.name: verify_debtor
tools.description: verify the caller is the debtor before disclosing any debt

tools.name: get_debt_details
tools.description: return debt balance for an account (ONLY after the debtor is verified)

tools.name: search_policy
tools.description: retrieve a factual policy answer by topic

tools.name: record_promise_to_pay
tools.description: record a promise to pay an amount by a date

tools.name: escalate_to_human
tools.description: hand the call to a human agent
